title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.212 - Six-director school district to be known as seven-director school district
text:
162.212.  Six-director school district to be known as seven-director school district. — The six-director school district shall hereafter be known as the seven-director school district.
(L. 1996 S.B. 687) 
Effective 5-24-96
